title: Ambuli
desc: When two students hear stories about Ambuli, a deadly beast that lives in the fields, they set out to investigate the monster's reality. However, they soon come across surprising facts.

title: Kannedhirey Thondrinal
desc: Vasanth learns that the girl he is in love with is his close friend Shankar's sister. When Shankar shares his bitter past with Vasanth, he decides to sacrifice his love to protect his friendship.

title: Raja Chinna Roja
desc: Raja, an aspiring actor, moves from his village to the big city to fulfil his ambitions. Soon, he meets his childhood friend, who offers him an acting job in exchange for taking care of his children.

title: Satyam
desc: Satyam is a budding writer who is always misunderstood by his father. As he struggles to make a mark professionally, his personal life goes through a surprising turn.

title: Kanchana
desc: Raghava, a scared boy, starts acting like a woman after being possessed by three ghosts. When his mother calls an exorcist, the traumatic pasts of the spirits come to light.
